appraisal_events.evidence: Elle ne lui adressa pas une parole, ne lui tendit pas la main, abaissa les paupières comme si elle dormait, puis se tourna pleine de vie vers un autre; plus tard, « elle avait fait le jeu de grande dame » universellement admiré.
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme de Villeparisis performs a grande-dame scene to push Bloch aside in public (silence, refusal of a handshake, feigned drowsiness), which constitutes a visible and deliberate social affront.

status_effects.explanation: Bloch is publicly kept at a distance (ignored, refusal of hand, not a word), which locally excludes him from the present circle.
Her « jeu de grande dame » is reported as universally admired and commented on in the salons, reinforcing her social prestige in the immediate term.
